title: Xtra Discs
description: New Discs for you to listen from the 'Animation Vs Minecraft' Series by Alan Becker!
body:
## This mod adds discs from the 'Animation VS Minecraft' Series!

### Featuring:

- Green's Jam - Aaron Grooves
- Jazzy Note Blocks - Aaron Grooves
- Pigstep Remix - Scott Buckley
- Chirp "Remix" - Scott Buckley

And More Coming Soon!

<details>
<summary>FAQ</summary>

Q: Will it come back?\
A: YES
 
</details>

## Credits:

Me, KidV0lt - Made the mod and got the .ogg files.\
Nac_Moonsilver - Made the logo and the Discs textures.

And for last but not least:

Alan Becker - Creator of AvM & AvA Series. \
Scott Buckley & Aaron Grooves - Muscicians of the Series.
